samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="s0">Initial state.</state>
        <state id="s1">State after detecting rising edge.</state>
        <state id="s2">State after detecting falling edge.</state>
        <state id="s3">State after detecting pulse end.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="state" width_description="[1:0]">Current state of the pulse detection process.</reg>
        <always>
            <if condition="~rst_n">
                <assign state = "s0"/>
                <assign data_out = "0"/>
            </if>
            <else>
                <case state>
                    <item value="s0">
                        <if condition="data_in == 1">
                            <assign state = "s1"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state = "s0"/>
                        </else>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s1">
                        <if condition="data_in == 0">
                            <assign state = "s2"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state = "s1"/>
                        </else>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s2">
                        <if condition="data_in == 1">
                            <assign state = "s3"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state = "s0"/>
                        </else>
                    </item>
                    <item value="s3">
                        <if condition="data_in == 0">
                            <assign state = "s0"/>
                            <assign data_out = "1"/>
                        </if>
                        <else>
                            <assign state = "s1"/>
                            <assign data_out = "0"/>
                        </else>
                    </item>
                </case>
            </else>
        </always>
    </logic_description>
</module>
